## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened.

## Environment

- **Component:** (SQL / PowerBI / PowerShell / VS Code / Other)
- **VS Code Version:** [e.g., 1.110.0]
- **PowerBI Desktop Version:** [if applicable]
- **SQL Server:** [e.g., VhaCdwDwhSql33]
- **Database:** [e.g., D03_VISN12Collab]
- **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11]

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

> **IMPORTANT:** Do NOT include any PHI/PII, patient names, SSNs, or other sensitive data in screenshots or descriptions.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
